# Synthetic v2 release fixture

`release-graph/` is a complete 78-file release graph. `release_graph.py`
deterministically rebuilds byte-identical files in test-owned `.work`
directories. The graph includes all ten closed dataset IDs,
one record/transcript/deliberation set per dataset, one explicitly approved
provider-reasoning item and terms artifact, one reviewed projection recipe,
one world-pack source, all review levels, an active review set, an immutable
catalog pointer, and latest.
Every receipt approves at most four artifacts, so each receipt plus its exact
artifact set can be published within the five-file hard limit before the
one-file latest activation.

No fixture file is a real release, external content, or personal data.
Tests mutate the generated bytes or the reusable semantic inputs to prove
fail-closed handling without committing publication objects to this repository.
